headline: Wall Street Lunch: Buffett Delays Gates Foundation Donation Amid Epstein Review
summary: Warren Buffett is holding off on his usual midyear donation to the Gates Foundation until he sees the results of a review into the foundation's ties to Jeffrey Epstein.

headline: Softbank stock target raised at Citi on profit growth
summary: Investing.com -- Citi raised its price target on Softbank to JPY255 from JPY240 and maintained its Buy rating in a note on Tuesday, citing strong earnings momentum and a medium-term plan that points to continued profit and dividend growth.

raw.headline: Softbank stock target raised at Citi on profit growth

headline: Citi says bearish flows are building in Nasdaq and S&P 500
summary: Investing.com -- Citi said in a note on Tuesday that bearish flows are building across the Nasdaq and S&P 500, with continued rotation into small caps signaling a divergence in global equity positioning led by the U.S. market.
